pr.title: Non-Record: Training on the Apple Neural Engine

output.summary: Runs GolfWide transformer matmuls and activation grads on the Apple Neural Engine via reverse-engineered MIL kernels while CPU handles masks, gradients, and optimizer.
techniques: Reverse-engineered MIL kernels for ANE matmuls
CPU handles causal masking, weight gradients, and Adam updates
IOSurface staging lets compiled kernels reuse weights without recompiles
